zh.lifeSummary: 當John Wolcott於1545年4月17日出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特陶頓時，他的父親Thomas Wolcott20歲，母親Alice Dawes51歲。他和Mrs John Wolcott至少有7個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1589年在他的家鄉享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特托藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Wolcott于1545年4月17日出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特陶頓时，他的父亲Thomas Wolcott20岁，母亲Alice Dawes51岁。他和Mrs John Wolcott至少有7个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1589年在他的家乡享年44岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特托藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Wolcott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Surrey): habitational name from Wollacott in Thrushelton (Devon), named from the Old English personal name Wulfnōth + cot ‘cottage, hut, shelter’. This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

History: Henry Wolcott (1578–1655), clothier, came from Tolland, Somerset, England, and settled in Windsor, CT, in 1636. His grandson Roger (1679–1767) was colonial governor of CT; his great-grandson Oliver (1726–1797) was a signer of the Declaration of Independence.

variants.name: Woolcock
meanings: English (Cornwall): probably a variant of   Wolcott  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When John Wolcott was born on 17 April 1545, in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Wolcott, was 20 and his mother, Alice Dawes, was 51. He had at least 7 sons and 2 daughters with Mrs John Wolcott. He died in 1589, in his hometown, at the age of 44, and was buried in Tolland, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Wolcott est né le 17 avril 1545, à Taunton, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Wolcott, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Alice Dawes, avait 51 ans. Il a eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles avec Mrs John Wolcott. Il est décédé en 1589, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Tolland, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Wolcott am 17. April 1545 in Taunton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Wolcott 20 und seine Mutter Alice Dawes 51. Er hatte mit Mrs John Wolcott mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1589 im Alter von 44 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Tolland, Somerset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Wolcott è nato il il 17 aprile 1545 nel Taunton, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Wolcott, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Alice Dawes, aveva 51 anni. Lui avuto almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie con Mrs John Wolcott. Morì nel 1589, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Tolland, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Wolcottが1545年4月17日にイギリスイギリスソメルセトタウントンで生まれた時，父Thomas Wolcottは20歳，母Alice Dawesは51歳であった。彼はMrs John Wolcottとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1589年に故郷で44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトトランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Wolcott(이)가 1545년 4월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 타운턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Wolcott(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Dawes(은)는 51세였다. 그는 Mrs John Wolcott(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1589년 그의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 톨랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Wolcott nasceu em 17 de abril de 1545, em Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Wolcott, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Alice Dawes, tinha 51 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas com Mrs John Wolcott. Ele faleceu em 1589, em sua cidade natal, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Tolland, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Wolcott родился 17 апреля 1545 г. в местности таунтон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Wolcott было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Dawes, 51. У него было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери от Mrs John Wolcott. Он умер в 1589 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности толланд, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Wolcott nació el 17 de abril de 1545, en Taunton, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Wolcott, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Alice Dawes, tenía 51 años. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas con Mrs John Wolcott. Murió en 1589, en su pueblo, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Tolland, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
